opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My armpit is completely swollen with these agonizing lumps that are bursting and draining. I can't lift my arm at all because the pain is so sharp.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: An agonising flare of recurrent armpit lumps that are draining and stopping me moving my arm.

symptom_narrative.onset: acute flare over 48h on a 5-year background
symptom_narrative.character: deep painful lumps that coalesce, burst and drain smelly pus
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonising, can't lift the arm or sleep
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right armpit (also groin and left armpit over the years)
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping the arm away from the body
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: malodorous discharge, tunnels/scars in the armpits; no high fever/rigors
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: recurrent painful lumps in armpits and groin for years with scarring
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't use the dominant arm; major quality-of-life impact

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent painful armpit/groin lumps for ~5 years with scarring and tunnels

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: significant psychosocial distress from the chronic condition

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frustrated and distressed by the recurrent, malodorous, painful disease

objective_data_offered.value: a large swollen inflamed area in the right armpit with several deep lumps, some draining smelly pus, plus old tunnels and scars; similar scars in the other armpit
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate extent or assess for deep spread
